# API Configuration
api_key=test_api_key_12345
api_base=https://api.anthropic.com/v1
model=claude-sonnet-4-0
max_tokens=8192
temperature=0.7

# Streaming
streaming=True

# Language
LANG=zh

# Round Sync
enable_round_sync=True
sync_round=3

# History Management
summary_trigger_length=100000
compression_strategy=llm_summary

# Multi-Agent
multi_agent=False

# Thinking
enable_thinking=False

# Truncation
truncation_length=10000
